notes: Exceptional performance. Population estimates for all 30 countries are accurate to 2014 mid-year (US 318.5M, China 1,364M, India 1,267M, etc.). Per capita calculations verified correct (US: $54.7k, China: $7.6k, Norway: $100.3k, India: $1.6k). Re-ranking properly executed with rank-shift column clearly showing outliers. Insight quality is outstanding: clearly articulates GDP-size vs per-capita-income distinction, identifies key surprises (India #10→#30, China #2→#26, Norway #27→#1), explains population's role in dilution, and notes US uniqueness as top-5 in both metrics. Methodology note is transparent about ±5% estimation accuracy and cites proper sources (UN, WB, CIA Factbook). Professional markdown formatting with clear tables and section organization. Minor deduction only: agent created two identical markdown files (gdp_per_capita_report.md and gdp_per_capita_report_1.md) rather than one, which is redundant but not a core error.
